description: KernelBench CUDA kernel optimization benchmark. Each task provides a reference PyTorch operation and a baseline CUDA kernel. The goal is to write optimized CUDA kernels that match the reference output while maximizing throughput (GFLOPS). Tasks range from simple element-wise ops to complex fused attention kernels.
target: Maximize throughput_gflops for each kernel task. Higher is better. Kernels must produce numerically correct output matching the PyTorch reference within tolerance.
